rationale: Fresh implementation validation passes for TASK-085 bounded task-scope enforcement slice. Accepted feedback, documentation, planning, and implementation builds form a traceable chain. Implementation build uses change_type=system, traceability.requires_accepted_build=true, and accepted_build_refs includes .codewiki/builds/planning/2026-05-16-planned-bounded-enforcement-work-for-task-bounda.json. Acceptance is met: task records are treated as bounded self-contained work; container/umbrella/sprint-label task patterns are rejected by task-boundary enforcement; task close preflight and task audit block container-style records; routing exposes executable/container boundary state; sprint metadata remains grouping layer only; TASK-077 is no longer active and historical evidence remains preserved. Checks pass.

Working tree remains dirty by design for validation; includes TASK-085 product/test/build changes plus pre-existing untracked TASK-089 validation files.
